description: David asked 'What is Galen capable of?' and Jarvis had no knowledge of the agent. Galen is a fully spec'd agent (agents/galen.md) with 5 skill files (galen-bloodwork, galen-morning-snapshot, galen-protocols, galen-visit-prep, galen-whoop-analysis) and a monthly health review workflow. He was not listed in SYSTEM.md's agent directory and not loaded during boot, so Jarvis searched externally and returned empty-handed before David pointed out to check the agents folder.
correction: Galen exists at agents/galen.md. Should have been found immediately by checking agents/ directory. SYSTEM.md agent roster was also missing Galen — now added. galen.md had incorrect data source paths (Obsidian) for bloodwork that lives on disk in Dropbox — also corrected.
systemic_fix: Added Galen to SYSTEM.md agent directory. Updated galen.md and galen-bloodwork SKILL.md to point to correct Dropbox paths for bloodwork PDFs. On boot, all agents/ files should be treated as authoritative — if David asks about an agent, check agents/ first.
